properties.displayName: Enforce Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) Microsoft Entra ID Integration
properties.description: Audits or denies Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) clusters that do not have Microsoft Entra ID integration managed by Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS). Entra ID integration allows Kubernetes role-based access control (RBAC) to use Entra ID identities and directory group memberships for cluster access management.

metadata.changeReason: Standardized metadata for governance traceability and consistent policy review context.
metadata.complianceIntent: Enforce or audit this specific AKS security control according to the assignment effect parameter.

metadata.description: Deny, Audit or Disabled the execution of the Policy
